{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322074929F7E1CC04F1B6BC46FDA7"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616999159535633176","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角喜欢找死，每天无消耗模拟一次，记忆能力物品全继承，在模拟器里算强的了，非要在现实中招惹敌人。
【模拟冷却时间：13小时】
“还剩13个小时，要不要找点事做？尤其是莫上仙的事情，应该早做准备”
想到这里，林凡决定直接去找天墉城城主孙成龙问个清楚。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773474217,"group_id":"7613420246501690392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1w1W5mfy4KOfkE4SG1gnoT0cnUKGZwzjALDuw7fT3gn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69965e3d88004f89a0962faa5886ad07~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703053&x-signature=MsgdDiRA2lr%2BLHiVQ%2FHUxIQMuEU%3D","user_id":"1192339441193768","user_name":"爱吃木氏木汤的木木木"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1192339441193768","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7613420246501690392","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟器+穿越+快节奏+不压战力+无女主+爽文】
一觉醒来，林凡穿成矿区里快被打死的病痨矿工。
欠债、挨鞭、吃土、等死？简直是地狱开局！
就在监工要把他扔进乱葬岗时，体内【人生模拟器】觉醒！
主世界挖矿等死？没事，我去异世界浪！
第一个世界【十日终焉】，进去就被人追杀？
没关系，反正现实里的身体还能躺。
一次模拟，带回一身变态技能。
二次模拟，监工跪着叫他爷。
三次模拟，四次模拟
.......
“什么叫模拟死了还能复活？”
“什么叫一个月速通修仙界？”
“我不吃牛肉！”
别的矿工挖矿挖到死，林凡躺着模拟就无敌。
当所有人以为他还在矿洞里吃灰时——
林凡已经站在了世界之巅，俯视众生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5037048b389642d40165665a11c437a2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"只想躺平的土豆","author_id":"","book_id":"7613420246501690392","book_name":"生生不息在手，模拟随便浪","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2000人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613420493630079512","read_count":"2000","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"129229"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"62","tags":"东方仙侠,异世大陆,东方玄幻,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5037048b389642d40165665a11c437a2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320969&x-signature=Esxd4giDeMFlI3v7OLkCZu%2BAr9o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"690929668993646","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322074929F7E1CC04F1B6BC46FDA7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读33分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1963,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":548},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"
